title: pseva umbellata
intro: Pseva umbellata, also known as  Fagonia arabica or Desert Lavender, is a plant species native to the Middle East and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pseva umbellata include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in various cultures. Pseva umbellata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
